prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 2 (CCTA/CDTA)** engine with K04 turbo upgrade (Garrett GT2867 .64 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, and 58mm inducer), paired with a **Neuspeed Power Module** for real-time boost control and fueling adjustments. Requires **IE 3" downpipe** with **Catted Vibrant 10442** high-flow catalytic converter and **APR Carbonio** intake system with heat-shielded silicone couplers.

Full **034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mount Kit** (polyurethane inserts with billet aluminum brackets) and **CTS Turbo Solid Motor Mount** to eliminate torque steer under aggressive launches. Suspension overhaul includes **KW Clubsport Coilovers (2-way adjustable)** with **H&R 24mm Front / 22mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** and **Whiteline Adjustable End Links** for precise roll-center tuning.

Forced-induction cooling via **Mishimoto X-Line Intercooler (FMIC)** with **Vibrant 1451** silicone charge pipes (4-ply reinforced) and **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller. Exhaust system features a **Supersprint 76mm Cat-Back** with **Scorpion 200-cell GPF** (Gasoline Particulate Filter) delete and **Remus Resonated Valve System** for backpressure optimization.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning MK6 GTI Widebody Kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) in **PPG Volkswagen Candy White** with **3M Matte Black Vinyl** overlay on the roof, mirrors, and rear hatch. Front bumper lip replaced with **VMR V710** carbon fiber splitter and **AWE Touring Edition** rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable).

OEM+ lighting upgrades: **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** with **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights** and **Depo Racing** smoked LED taillights (sequential turn signals). Wheels are **BBS SR 18x8.5 ET45** in **Gunmetal Finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (235/40/18) and **H&R TRAK+** 25mm spacers for flush fitment.

Interior refinements include **Recaro Sportster CS** seats (red leather/Alcantara) with **Schroth Profi II 4-Point Harnesses**, **Momo Mod.78** flat-bottom steering wheel (320mm, suede), and **P3 Cars Vent-Mounted Multi-Gauge** (boost, AFR, oil temp). Shift knob upgraded to **DieselGeek Sigma 6 Short Shifter** with **034 Motorsport Shift Cable Bushings** for crisp engagement.
